intentSynonyms: look up a metadata in ganalytics
fetch a single metadata in ganalytics
view one specific metadata in ganalytics
list available dimensions and metrics in ganalytics
description: List all available dimensions and metrics for a GA4 property. Use this to discover which fields can be used in run_report. Optionally filter by category to narrow results. Use property_id "0" for universal metadata (not property-specific).

property_id.description: GA4 property ID (numeric string). Use "0" for universal metadata.
